expectations.text: Identifies this as auto mode (not command shortcut)
expectations.evidence: Agent output: 'Mode selected: AUTO — does not match any command shortcut keyword'
Agent output: 'Step 1: Codex runs --full-auto --skip-git-repo-check and classifies the input'
Agent output: 2 subtasks — executor(프론트엔드 리팩터링) + security-reviewer(보안 리뷰)

expectations.text: Notes delegation to tfx-multi for subtasks >= 2
expectations.evidence: Agent output: 'subtasks.length = 2 >= 2, tfx-auto automatically hands off to tfx-multi Phase 3'

expectations.text: Does NOT try to execute all subtasks directly
expectations.evidence: Agent correctly delegates to tfx-multi instead of direct execution
